en.name: AR-15 Daniel Defense RIS II FSP 12.25 inch handguard (FDE)
en.description: The Daniel Defense RIS II 12.25 foregrip is a part of the SOPMOD Block II program to replace the standard M4CQBR or Mk18 foregrips in the US SOCOM service. It's made with light but durable aircraft aluminum alloy and comes equipped with 4 mounts for the installation of additional devices and accessories. This foregrip option is incompatible with the M203 UBGL.
